cpcResults.description: session must become a property in RequestContext
internal references must use _session to avoid infinite recursion through the property
accessed must be set in the property, not in session methods
Config key must be added to Flask default config in app.py
max_form_memory_size and max_form_parts must be implemented as properties
Properties must check current_app to distinguish in-context from out-of-context
Must fall back to Werkzeug base class defaults when outside app context
render/json.go Render method must return the error from WriteJSON rather than panicking
context.Render must push the error to the context error chain
context.Render must abort the response after a render error
ContextWithFallback bool field must be added to Engine struct
All four context methods must check c.engine.ContextWithFallback before delegating
When flag is set, methods must delegate to the HTTP request's context
Must define skippedNode struct to hold backtracking state
Must add countSections function to track maximum path depth
countSections must use the zero-copy bytesconv.StringToBytes conversion
getValue must use the skippedNodes stack instead of a single latestNode pointer
skippedNode must record parameter count to correctly restore params on backtrack
